request.body.input.parameters.system.memory是设备内存 单位是：M 支持参数:512,1024,2048,4096,8192,16384

status.description: 状态 0: 查询所有  1:准备中  2:执行中 3:执行成功 4:失败 5:中止

custom.description: Choose your starting point: hashtags #️⃣, profiles 😎, search results 🔍 or specific tiktoks 🔗. To try the scraper, just add a hashtag, then indicate how many tiktoks you want extracted in the 💯 Number of videos and hit the ▷ Start button. Here’s a tutorial to help.

scraper.title: Google Maps Scraper
scraper.description: 1Extract data from thousands of Google Maps locations and businesses, including reviews, reviewer details, images, contact info, opening hours, location, prices & more. Export scraped data, run the scraper via API, schedule and monitor runs, or integrate with other tools.

scraper.title: Full TikTok API Scraper
scraper.description: Access the TikTok mobile API for user, posts, sounds, search, comments, followers, and more. Unlock TikTok data at scale. Have custom needs? Visit scraptik.com111

scraper.title: Amazon Product By ASIN
scraper.description: Our Amazon product scraping tool extracts key product data (seller, brand, pricing, ASIN, reviews, etc.). It supports diverse scraping methods ASIN and lets you download structured results.

scraper.title: Amazon Product By Best Sellers
scraper.description: Our Amazon product scraping tool extracts key product data (seller, brand, pricing, ASIN, reviews, etc.). It supports diverse scraping methods Best Sellers and lets you download structured results.

scraper.title: Amazon Product By Category URL
scraper.description: Our Amazon product scraping tool extracts detailed product data—seller, brand, pricing, ASIN, reviews, category, ranking, etc.—supports category URL scraping, and outputs results in multiple structured formats for download.

scraper.title: Amazon Product By UPC
scraper.description: Our Amazon product scraping tool extracts key product data (seller, brand, pricing, ASIN, reviews, etc.). It supports diverse scraping methods  UPC and lets you download structured results.

scraper.title: Amazon Product By URL
scraper.description: Our Amazon product scraping tool extracts key product data (seller, brand, pricing, ASIN, reviews, etc.). It supports diverse scraping methods URL and lets you download structured results.

scraper.title: Amazon Product List By Keywords
scraper.description: Our Amazon product scraping tool extracts key product data (seller, brand, pricing, ASIN, reviews, etc.). It supports diverse scraping methods Keywords  and lets you download structured results.

scraper.title: Amazon Product List By Keywords Domain
scraper.description: Our Amazon product listing scraper extracts ASIN, title, sponsorship status, price, sales volume, rating, reviews, badges, brand, image, monthly sales, coupons, etc., with results in multiple structured download formats.

scraper.title: Amazon Seller By URL
scraper.description: Our Amazon seller data scraper extracts key details post-scraping: profile URL, unique ID, name, overview, full details, feedback volume, average rating, email, phone number, product count, business address, shipping rates, etc. Download structured data in multiple formats.

scraper.title: Amazon Global Product By Category URL
scraper.description: Our Amazon Global Product Scraping Tool extracts detailed product data (seller, brand, description, prices, discount, currency, reviews, ASIN, rankings, etc.) via category URLs, and exports data in structured formats.

scraper.title: Amazon Global Product By Keywords
scraper.description: Our Amazon Global Product Scraping Tool extracts detailed product data (seller, brand, description, prices, discount, currency, reviews, ASIN, rankings, etc.) via  keywords, and exports data in structured formats.
